title: Grilled Venezuelan Seafood Skewers
description: A flavorful and spicy seafood dish inspired by Venezuelan cuisine, perfect for a quick and easy meal. The combination of grilled shrimp, scallops, and fish, marinated in a zesty mixture of lime juice, garlic, and cumin, will transport your taste buds to the coast of Venezuela.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together lime juice, garlic, cumin, and grill seasoning.
Add the shrimp, scallops, and cod to the marinade and toss to coat.
Thread the marinated seafood onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the seafood skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until cooked through.
Serve immediately with chewy baguette slices on the side.
